questions.reason: By rearranging the terms of \( 3 \cos\theta - 4 \sin\theta = 2 \cos\theta + \sin\theta \), we get \( 3 \cos\theta - 2 \cos\theta = \sin\theta + 4 \sin\theta \). This gives \( \cos\theta = 5 \sin\theta \). Thus, \( \frac{\sin\theta}{\cos\theta} = \frac{1}{5} \), which means \( \tan\theta = \frac{1}{5} \).
questions.reason_hi: \( 3 \cos\theta - 4 \sin\theta = 2 \cos\theta + \sin\theta \) के पदों को व्यवस्थित करने पर, \( 3 \cos\theta - 2 \cos\theta = \sin\theta + 4 \sin\theta \) प्राप्त होता है। इससे \( \cos\theta = 5 \sin\theta \) आता है। इस प्रकार, \( \frac{\sin\theta}{\cos\theta} = \frac{1}{5} \), जिसका अर्थ है \( \tan\theta = \frac{1}{5} \)।

questions.reason: By cross-multiplying the equation: \( 5(2 \sin\theta - 3 \cos\theta) = 2(3 \sin\theta + 2 \cos\theta) \), we get \( 10 \sin\theta - 15 \cos\theta = 6 \sin\theta + 4 \cos\theta \). Bringing similar terms together gives \( 4 \sin\theta = 19 \cos\theta \). Therefore, \( \tan\theta = \frac{\sin\theta}{\cos\theta} = \frac{19}{4} \).
questions.reason_hi: समीकरण का वज्र गुणन (Cross multiplication) करने पर: \( 5(2 \sin\theta - 3 \cos\theta) = 2(3 \sin\theta + 2 \cos\theta) \), जिससे \( 10 \sin\theta - 15 \cos\theta = 6 \sin\theta + 4 \cos\theta \) प्राप्त होता है। समान पदों को एक साथ लाने पर \( 4 \sin\theta = 19 \cos\theta \) मिलता है। अतः, \( \tan\theta = \frac{\sin\theta}{\cos\theta} = \frac{19}{4} \) होगा।

questions.reason: Substitute \( \cot\theta = \frac{1}{\tan\theta} \) to get \( \frac{\tan\theta + \frac{1}{\tan\theta}}{\tan\theta - \frac{1}{\tan\theta}} = 2 \). This simplifies to \( \frac{\tan^2\theta + 1}{\tan^2\theta - 1} = 2 \). Cross-multiplying yields \( \tan^2\theta + 1 = 2\tan^2\theta - 2 \), which gives \( \tan^2\theta = 3 \), so \( \tan\theta = \sqrt{3} \). This means \( \theta = 60^\circ \). Therefore, \( \sin(60^\circ) = \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \).
questions.reason_hi: \( \cot\theta = \frac{1}{\tan\theta} \) रखने पर \( \frac{\tan\theta + \frac{1}{\tan\theta}}{\tan\theta - \frac{1}{\tan\theta}} = 2 \) प्राप्त होता है। इसे हल करने पर \( \frac{\tan^2\theta + 1}{\tan^2\theta - 1} = 2 \) मिलता है। वज्र गुणन करने पर \( \tan^2\theta + 1 = 2\tan^2\theta - 2 \) आता है, जिससे \( \tan^2\theta = 3 \) और \( \tan\theta = \sqrt{3} \) प्राप्त होता है। इसका अर्थ है \( \theta = 60^\circ \)। अतः, \( \sin(60^\circ) = \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \) होगा।

questions.reason: Cross-multiplying gives \( \sin\theta + \cos\theta = 3\sin\theta - 3\cos\theta \). Rearranging yields \( 4\cos\theta = 2\sin\theta \), meaning \( \tan\theta = \frac{2}{1} \). Using a right triangle where Perpendicular = 2 and Base = 1, Hypotenuse = \( \sqrt{2^2+1^2} = \sqrt{5} \). Thus, \( \sin\theta = \frac{2}{\sqrt{5}} \) and \( \cos\theta = \frac{1}{\sqrt{5}} \). The expression \( \sin^4\theta - \cos^4\theta = (\sin^2\theta - \cos^2\theta)(\sin^2\theta + \cos^2\theta) = (\sin^2\theta - \cos^2\theta)(1) = \left(\frac{2}{\sqrt{5}}\right)^2 - \left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{5}}\right)^2 = \frac{4}{5} - \frac{1}{5} = \frac{3}{5} \).
questions.reason_hi: वज्र गुणन करने पर \( \sin\theta + \cos\theta = 3 \sin\theta - 3 \cos\theta \) प्राप्त होता है। व्यवस्थित करने पर \( 4 \cos\theta = 2 \sin\theta \), जिसका अर्थ है \( \tan\theta = \frac{2}{1} \)। समकोण त्रिभुज से जहाँ लंब = 2 और आधार = 1 है, कर्ण = \( \sqrt{2^2+1^2} = \sqrt{5} \) होगा। अतः, \( \sin\theta = \frac{2}{\sqrt{5}} \) और \( \cos\theta = \frac{1}{\sqrt{5}} \)। व्यंजक \( \sin^4\theta - \cos^4\theta = (\sin^2\theta - \cos^2\theta)(\sin^2\theta + \cos^2\theta) = (\sin^2\theta - \cos^2\theta)(1) = \left(\frac{2}{\sqrt{5}}\right)^2 - \left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{5}}\right)^2 = \frac{4}{5} - \frac{1}{5} = \frac{3}{5} \)।

questions.reason: Divide the numerator and denominator of the LHS by \( \cos\theta \). This transforms the equation to \( \frac{1 - \tan\theta}{1 + \tan\theta} \). By comparing this directly to the RHS \( \frac{1 - \sqrt{3}}{1 + \sqrt{3}} \), we can see that \( \tan\theta = \sqrt{3} \). Therefore, \( \theta = 60^\circ \).
questions.reason_hi: LHS के अंश और हर को \( \cos\theta \) से विभाजित करें। यह समीकरण को \( \frac{1 - \tan\theta}{1 + \tan\theta} \) में बदल देता है। इसकी तुलना सीधे RHS \( \frac{1 - \sqrt{3}}{1 + \sqrt{3}} \) से करने पर, हम देख सकते हैं कि \( \tan\theta = \sqrt{3} \) है। अतः, \( \theta = 60^\circ \)।

questions.reason: Substituting standard trigonometric values: \( \sin 45^\circ = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \), \( \sin 30^\circ = \frac{1}{2} \), \( \cos 45^\circ = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \), and \( \cos 30^\circ = \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \). The expression becomes \( \left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)\left(\frac{1}{2}\right) + \left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)\left(\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\right) = \frac{1}{2\sqrt{2}} + \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2\sqrt{2}} = \frac{\sqrt{3} + 1}{2\sqrt{2}} \).
questions.reason_hi: मानक त्रिकोणमितीय मान रखने पर: \( \sin 45^\circ = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \), \( \sin 30^\circ = \frac{1}{2} \), \( \cos 45^\circ = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \), और \( \cos 30^\circ = \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \)। व्यंजक \( \left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)\left(\frac{1}{2}\right) + \left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)\left(\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\right) = \frac{1}{2\sqrt{2}} + \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2\sqrt{2}} = \frac{\sqrt{3} + 1}{2\sqrt{2}} \) बन जाता है।

questions.reason: Substituting standard values: \( \left(\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\right)\left(\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\right) + \left(\frac{1}{2}\right)\left(\frac{1}{2}\right) = \frac{3}{4} + \frac{1}{4} = \frac{4}{4} = 1 \). Alternatively, using the formula \( \sin(A)\cos(B) + \cos(A)\sin(B) = \sin(A+B) \), this is equal to \( \sin(60^\circ + 30^\circ) = \sin(90^\circ) = 1 \).
questions.reason_hi: मानक मान रखने पर: \( \left(\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\right)\left(\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\right) + \left(\frac{1}{2}\right)\left(\frac{1}{2}\right) = \frac{3}{4} + \frac{1}{4} = \frac{4}{4} = 1 \)। वैकल्पिक रूप से, \( \sin(A)\cos(B) + \cos(A)\sin(B) = \sin(A+B) \) सूत्र का उपयोग करने पर, यह \( \sin(60^\circ + 30^\circ) = \sin(90^\circ) = 1 \) के बराबर है।

questions.reason: Substituting standard trigonometric values: \( \cos 60^\circ = \frac{1}{2} \), \( \cos 45^\circ = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \), \( \sin 60^\circ = \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \), and \( \sin 45^\circ = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \). The expression becomes \( \left(\frac{1}{2}\right)\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right) - \left(\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\right)\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right) = \frac{1}{2\sqrt{2}} - \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2\sqrt{2}} = \frac{1 - \sqrt{3}}{2\sqrt{2}} \).
questions.reason_hi: मानक त्रिकोणमितीय मान रखने पर: \( \cos 60^\circ = \frac{1}{2} \), \( \cos 45^\circ = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \), \( \sin 60^\circ = \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2} \), और \( \sin 45^\circ = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \)। व्यंजक \( \left(\frac{1}{2}\right)\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right) - \left(\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\right)\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right) = \frac{1}{2\sqrt{2}} - \frac{\sqrt{3}}{2\sqrt{2}} = \frac{1 - \sqrt{3}}{2\sqrt{2}} \) बन जाता है।

questions.reason: Substituting standard values: \( \tan 45^\circ = 1 \), \( \csc 30^\circ = 2 \), \( \sec 60^\circ = 2 \), \( \cot 45^\circ = 1 \), \( \sin 90^\circ = 1 \), \( \cos 0^\circ = 1 \). The expression becomes \( \frac{1}{2} + \frac{2}{1} - \frac{5(1)}{2(1)} = \frac{1}{2} + 2 - \frac{5}{2} = 2.5 - 2.5 = 0 \).

questions.reason_hi: मान रखने पर: \( \sin 30^\circ = \frac{1}{2} \), \( \cos 45^\circ = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}} \), \( \tan 60^\circ = \sqrt{3} \)। व्यंजक \( 2\left(\frac{1}{2}\right)^2 - 3\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)^2 + (\sqrt{3})^2 = 2\left(\frac{1}{4}\right) - 3\left(\frac{1}{2}\right) + 3 = \frac{1}{2} - \frac{3}{2} + 3 = -1 + 3 = 2 \) हो जाता है।

questions.reason: Substituting standard values: \( x\left(\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\right)^2 - \left(\frac{3}{2}\right)(2)\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{3}}\right)^2 + \left(\frac{4}{5}\right)\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)^2(\sqrt{3})^2 = 0 \). Simplifying gives \( x\left(\frac{3}{4}\right) - 3\left(\frac{1}{3}\right) + \left(\frac{4}{5}\right)\left(\frac{1}{2}\right)(3) = 0 \). This gives \( \frac{3x}{4} - 1 + \frac{6}{5} = 0 \). So, \( \frac{3x}{4} + \frac{1}{5} = 0 \implies \frac{3x}{4} = -\frac{1}{5} \implies x = -\frac{4}{15} \).
questions.reason_hi: मानक मान रखने पर: \( x\left(\frac{\sqrt{3}}{2}\right)^2 - \left(\frac{3}{2}\right)(2)\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{3}}\right)^2 + \left(\frac{4}{5}\right)\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right)^2(\sqrt{3})^2 = 0 \)। हल करने पर \( x\left(\frac{3}{4}\right) - 3\left(\frac{1}{3}\right) + \left(\frac{4}{5}\right)\left(\frac{1}{2}\right)(3) = 0 \) प्राप्त होता है। इससे \( \frac{3x}{4} - 1 + \frac{6}{5} = 0 \) मिलता है। अतः, \( \frac{3x}{4} + \frac{1}{5} = 0 \implies \frac{3x}{4} = -\frac{1}{5} \implies x = -\frac{4}{15} \)।

questions.reason: Substituting standard values: \( x\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right) = y(2) \). Rearranging this gives \( \frac{x}{y} = 2\sqrt{2} \). Therefore, \( \left(\frac{x}{y}\right)^4 = (2\sqrt{2})^4 = 16 \times 4 = 64 \).
questions.reason_hi: मानक मान रखने पर: \( x\left(\frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\right) = y(2) \)। इसे व्यवस्थित करने पर \( \frac{x}{y} = 2\sqrt{2} \) प्राप्त होता है। इसलिए, \( \left(\frac{x}{y}\right)^4 = (2\sqrt{2})^4 = 16 \times 4 = 64 \) होगा।

questions.reason: Given \( \csc\theta = \frac{\sqrt{3}}{1} \) (Hypotenuse / Perpendicular), so \( H = \sqrt{3} \) and \( P = 1 \). Base \( B = \sqrt{H^2 - P^2} = \sqrt{3 - 1} = \sqrt{2} \). Now, \( \cot\theta = \frac{\text{Base}}{\text{Perpendicular}} = \frac{\sqrt{2}}{1} = \sqrt{2} \). Therefore, \( \cot\theta - \csc\theta = \sqrt{2} - \sqrt{3} \).
questions.reason_hi: दिया गया है \( \csc\theta = \frac{\sqrt{3}}{1} \) (कर्ण / लंब), अतः \( H = \sqrt{3} \) और \( P = 1 \) है। आधार \( B = \sqrt{H^2 - P^2} = \sqrt{3 - 1} = \sqrt{2} \)। अब, \( \cot\theta = \frac{\text{आधार}}{\text{लंब}} = \frac{\sqrt{2}}{1} = \sqrt{2} \)। अतः, \( \cot\theta - \csc\theta = \sqrt{2} - \sqrt{3} \) होगा।
